chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl.No.2326 of 2025 Date Order with signature of the Judge Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro. Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz ul Hassan Shah. Sikander Ali..............Vs........................ The State 11.12.2025. Mr. Wariam Ali Kalhoro, Advocate for applicant Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Addl. P.G. O R D E R = MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant was arrested on 14.05.2025 by a police team of P.S. KIA, Karachi headed by SIP Gul Muhammad, from Gabol Goth, Jatoi Muhammad Ali Goth, Sector 8/C, Gulzar Colony Karachi on suspicious condition and from him 1035 grams of Charas was recovered, hence he was booked in FIR bearing Cr. No.605/2025 U/s 9 3(c), Sindh, CNS Act, 2024 of P.S. KIA, Karachi. 2. Learned counsel in defence submits that applicant is the first offender; the investigation is complete; challan has been submitted and the alleged offence does not fall within prohibitory clause of section 497 Cr.P.C. 3. On the other hand, learned D.P.G. has opposed the bail. 4. We have considered arguments of the parties and perused material available on record. The applicant is the first offender. The offence does not fall within prohibitory clause of section 497 Cr.P.C.; more so since challan has been submitted, applicant is no more required for further investigation. Accordingly, this application is allowed and applicant is granted bail subject to his furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the trail court. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial.

Accordingly, this application is allowed and applicant is granted bail subject to his furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the trail court. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. The Cr. Bail Application is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE A.K
